channel.title: definition on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in definition on Nature Works

item.title: Definition
item.description:
A self-nourishing wildlife orchard underplanted with edible shrubs and perennial vegetables. Productive, sustainable and low-maintenance 💚 🌳

A forest garden mimics the edge of woodland and works with nature to grow produce sustainably for less work. http://localhost:1313/definition/

item.title: What is a Forest Garden?
item.description:
A forest garden is like a wildlife orchard underplanted with edible shrubs and perennial vegetables. It is productive, sustainable and low-maintenance 💚 🌳

With a forest garden, you can grow food sustainably for less work and more wildlife. http://localhost:1313/blog/what-is-a-forest-garden/
